title: Advanced AAA Batteries, 10-Pack, Supercharged, Longer Lasting for remote control batteries can last 2-3 years.
features: VERSATILE COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for multiple devices including torches, radios, remote controls, game controllers and other electronic devices
PACK CONTENTS: Contains 10 AAA size batteries in a convenient retail blister pack with long-lasting supercharged performance
STORAGE GUIDANCE: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and metal objects for optimal battery life and safety
POWER RATING: 1.5V AAA batteries designed for reliable performance in standard household electronic devices
SAFETY FEATURES: Built-in protection against leakage, with clear safety instructions for proper handling and disposal
description: Power up your devices with Exercell's Advanced Supercharged AAA batteries, now featuring longer-lasting performance. This convenient 10-pack is perfect for all your household electronic needs, including torches, radios, remote controls, game controllers, and various other devices. These batteries are designed for reliable performance and come with comprehensive safety features. Ideal for both everyday use and high-power devices that utilise simultaneous light, movement, and sound functions. Store them properly in a cool, dry place, and always follow proper battery handling guidelines for optimal performance and safety. These non-rechargeable batteries are compatible with a wide range of household electronics, making them a practical choice for keeping your devices running smoothly. Each pack includes 10 individually-sealed AAA batteries, ensuring fresh power when you need it most. Remember to properly dispose of used batteries and never mix different types or brands to maintain optimal safety and performance.
